shapes.text: An emotional action series that touches the heart and pumps up adrenaline.
A former shadow soldier returns to his hometown to seek revenge on the syndicate that destroyed his family, but his revenge turns into a struggle to save the innocent.

A former shadow soldier returns to his hometown to find his family destroyed by a criminal syndicate. As his revenge burns, he finds himself caught in a larger war to save the innocent from destruction.
idealistic journalist who holds a big secret
antagonist, ruler of the dark world
Dominant colors: Black, blood red, fire orange
